summary: Fix silent data loss: every non-GET API request was calling os.RemoveAll on the shared cache directory, which deleted store.db right after sync wrote to it. Moved HTTP response cache into a `responses/` subdirectory so the analytics store is untouched.
reason: The Printing Press generated a Client that puts its HTTP response cache at the same path as the Store package's SQLite DB. invalidateCache() runs after every POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH and does `os.RemoveAll(cacheDir)`. Sync POSTs to /searchAnalytics/query so every sync silently deleted store.db immediately after writing it. Generalizable Printing Press bug: any printed CLI that combines Client (with response cache) + Store (with SQLite) at the same canonical cache path has the same trap.
validated_outcome: After fix: 21-day sync persists 23,250 rows, quick-wins/cliff/compare/historical all return real data. Response cache .json files now live in `~/.cache/<cli>/responses/` while store.db lives at `~/.cache/<cli>/store.db`. POST requests safely invalidate only response JSON.
